title: senecio jathrophoides
intro: Senecio jathrophoides, also known as Yellow Bush Senecio or Yellow Ragwort, is a perennial plant native to South Africa, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and small, narrow leaves. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid compounds. The health benefits of Senecio jathrophoides include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne, and it is also used to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of Senecio jathrophoides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
